hindi: जय संतोषी माता सुखदाती। भक्तन पर करो सदा मेहरबानी॥
english: Victory to Santoshi Mata, giver of happiness; always show mercy to devotees
roman: Jai Santoshi Mata Sukhdati, Bhaktan Par Karo Sada Mehrabani

hindi: जय संतोषी माता रानी। गणेश सुता भक्तन हितकारी॥
english: Victory to Santoshi Mata, the queen; daughter of Ganesha, benefactor of devotees
roman: Jai Santoshi Mata Rani, Ganesh Suta Bhaktan Hitkari

hindi: गुड़ चना प्रिय तुम्हें अर्पण। शुक्रवार का व्रत शुभ निर्गुण॥
english: Jaggery and gram are offered to you; the Friday fast is auspicious and pure
roman: Gud Chana Priya Tumhen Arpan, Shukravar Ka Vrat Shubh Nirgun

hindi: तेरी शरण में जो आता। इच्छित सुख वरदान पाता॥
english: Whoever comes to your shelter; receives desired happiness as a boon
roman: Teri Sharan Mein Jo Aata, Ichchhit Sukh Vardan Pata

hindi: व्रत कथा सुनने से सुख पाए। कष्ट निवारण शीघ्र हो जाए॥
english: By listening to your vrat katha happiness is gained; troubles are quickly dispelled
roman: Vrat Katha Sunne Se Sukh Paaye, Kasht Nivaran Shighra Ho Jaaye

hindi: संतोषी चालीसा जो गावे। ऋद्धि सिद्धि सब निश्चित पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Santoshi Chalisa; certainly attains all prosperity and powers
roman: Santoshi Chalisa Jo Gaave, Riddhi Siddhi Sab Nishchit Paave

hindi: जय जय संतोषी माता भवानी। भक्तन को दो सुख की निशानी॥
english: Victory to Santoshi Mata Bhavani; give devotees the sign of happiness
roman: Jai Jai Santoshi Mata Bhavani, Bhaktan Ko Do Sukh Ki Nishani
